title: Capacity Planning: Riding Your Waves
description: A wave graph illustrating the fluctuating demand for IT resources over time, the steady baseline capacity, and the flexible 'wave-riding' capacity that bridges the gap.
relationships: The 'Wave Riding' Capacity is a flexible buffer that expands and contracts above the Baseline Capacity to meet the peaks and troughs of the Actual Demand wave, ensuring performance without over-provisioning.
